body.body:
Implement #240. Pre-approved plan (Designer reviewed):

1. cognition/basal_ganglia.py (MEDIUM): add watch type handling — on trigger match, boost TWM salience (min(1.0, current+0.3)) instead of dispatching action. Write WATCH_HIT| ring entry. Skip if metadata.watch_expires < now.

2. tools/watchlist.py (new, LOW): list_watchlist() tool — returns Igor watch habits as formatted list. Register in tool registry.

3. claudecode/seed_watchlist_habits.py (new): seed Leah (permanent/person) and found resources/coins (permanent/resource).

No schema changes. watch_expires and employer_id in metadata only. Read every file before editing. Add forensic logging. Test via CC bridge after each change. Post result when done.
body.title: Implement watchlist habit_type=watch (#240)
body.result: All three parts already implemented: tools/watchlist.py (list_watchlist tool registered), main.py D080 watch handler (lines 3471-3509: TWM salience boost + ring write + fall-through), seed_watchlist_habits.py. PROC_WATCH_LEAH + PROC_WATCH_FOUND_COINS confirmed seeded in live DB. BG scores watch habits normally (no exclusion needed). Task was in_progress from prior session — work was already complete.
